reviews.review_description: When you load the game it takes you straight to a page with options to donate money to them, .99, 9.99 and 99.99, if you stare forward for too long it donates 9.99, you go back to main menu and play the game and when it goes off you have to stare at the word "end" but when you do it flashes 99.99 then redirects you straight to payment methods!! Luckily I haven't set up a payment method so be careful these cheeky sods are trying to scam money out of us all!!
Terrible "game" that tries and gets you to donate $10 as soon as the "game" finishes. DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS SPAM.

With such high quality experiences out there for free I cannot condone this blatant cash grab. Yeah ok, I'll donate $99. If only I could figure out how to delete all trace of it from all aspects of my existence
Almost had me donate $99... clicked out of it so fast and uninstalled.. wow...
Love this keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for positive feedback, we very appreciate it.
If you want to recieve all information about our new games and updates, 
please write us on vr.support@alawar.com and we will keep you in touch.

reviews.review_description: Whenever I'm outside the house the controller suddenly flips backwards, was this intentional? Seriously affected my game play.

Some nice ideas, I like the "choose your own story" approach. But the lack of animations, no voice over, cardboard like gaze controls and very cheap and forced jump scares make this a rather average experience. Horror is not about how much jump scares you can fit into 5 minutes, it's about atmosphere. 

It's a free game and a good attempt, but the cheap jump scares and cardboard like controls make this game feel like one of the early cardboard games.

Since it is free and has some good ideas, give it a try but don't expect too much.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, we very appreciate it. 
Feel free to write your advices how to make game better on vr.support@alawar.com and we will necessarily consider your ideas.

reviews.review_description: It's so hard to choose what your gonna pick

I love the story line of this game and the jumpscares are ok but I do suggest that you work more on the graphics of the characters and put more choices well i mean more endings I hope this helps the creator of this game you are doing good keep up the good work I very much wish to be like you one day I am 13 years old and i have always wanted to do tech for a job one day so yeah see ya

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for the kind words and sugesstions! See you in gamedev in future!

reviews.review_description: When it said he's always here I'm behind you I turned my vr and closed my eyes because I was so scared this was a great game!
Good game experience recommend you give it a try

reviews.review_title: What a load of steaming crap!
reviews.review_description: Were it possible to give negative stars, I would certainly do so. This had the worst graphics and the only thing that was scary about it is that I bothered to play it. RUN away from wasting your time.
I loved it and still have it.  It's an amazing game it's scarier than a lot of the paid games so it's an amazing deal!
Can not stop laughing after seeing that pathetic lunatic clown Sammy and his clown mom ... :D :D
Good job
Not bad. Better graphics and long play and it would be good
Doesn’t work with go. Waste of money
Does not work with the controller, I want my money back, can't even enter the house!!
This was my first game i played i really enjoyed it

But the Anti -Anaisling needs to be improved on the windows. will also be great if more storylines, characters and rooms to summon the spirits of the house were added that will definitely make this game rock!
